scripts.//spike-filter: The '!@spike/*' filter EXCLUDES the @spike/* DEV-ONLY fixtures under examples/ (dev-server, the synthetic stream/agent packs) from CI build/test/typecheck. The @rayspec/local-boot spec-driven boot wrapper is a @rayspec/* member and IS covered by CI.
scripts.//test: `--concurrency=1` serializes turbo's package-level test tasks (one package's vitest at a time). WHY: `@rayspec/durable-dbos` + `@rayspec/server` are the only two packages that boot a REAL DBOS engine (DBOS.launch) and, run concurrently against the one shared local Postgres, cause catalog/pool pressure (deadlocks, CREATE/DROP-DATABASE lock races); separately, `@rayspec/cli`'s gen-handler typecheck test writes throwaway files into packages/kernel/platform/src and a concurrent `tsc -b` of platform/api-auth globs them mid-delete (TS6053). Serializing the turbo task graph removes both cross-package races. NOT MASKING A PROD BUG: this is a TEST-HARNESS artifact of N throwaway DBs + two engine-booting packages sharing ONE local Postgres; prod uses ONE app DB + ONE sys DB. Intra-package parallelism is unchanged (each vitest config still controls its own files); isolated `pnpm --filter X test` runs are unaffected (no `--concurrency` there). build/typecheck untouched. (Companion fix: `packages/app/cli/vitest.config.ts` raises the cli testTimeout to 60s so `cli/index.test.ts`'s in-process `plan` cold-start cannot trip the 5000ms default under full-suite CPU load — TEST-FLAKE-1's cli half. The remaining api-auth refresh grace-window flake stays TEST-FLAKE-1, a separate security-code follow-up.)
scripts.gate: pnpm gate:chokepoint && pnpm gate:adapter-handlers && pnpm gate:handler-imports && pnpm gate:extension-capability && pnpm gate:spec-schema && pnpm gate:no-pack && pnpm gate:fixture-neutrality && pnpm gate:byte-identity && pnpm gate:sbom-fresh && pnpm gate:migrations && pnpm gate:shadow-dryrun && pnpm gate:migrate-clean && pnpm gate:parity && pnpm gate:no-archaeology && pnpm gate:skill-drift
